title: Mobs of Mythology
description: Discover a World of Mythological Creatures in Minecraft!
body:
[![Header Card](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Mobs_of_Mythology/BH_MOM_header_new.webp)](https://pixeldreamstudios.net)

[![BisectHosting Card](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Mobs_of_Mythology/BH_MOM_promo.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/PixelDream)

![Description Card](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Mobs_of_Mythology/BH_MOM_description.webp)

Mobs of Mythology brings mythological creatures to your Minecraft world! This mod introduces a whole new level of challenge and adventure, allowing you to face unique and formidable foes while exploring.

For more details checkout the [wiki](https://wiki.pixeldreamstudios.net/mods/mobs-of-mythology/)!

[![Discord Card](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Mobs_of_Mythology/BH_MOM_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/pixel-dream-studios-872788557553610802)
